name: Meowscarada - (NTR?)
description:
Hm... I don't know if I should consider this NTR. She's not your partner, just your Pokémon.

But if you want to make her your partner and stop her being a whore to anyone else, you can make her yours. She's mostly a nymphomaniac bitch; you just have to please her enough.

You live in an apartment in the city. There are very general and superficial tokens for stores, parks, alleys, people, or Pokémon. So, more than anything, this bot is for generating interactions with Meowscarada, and not so much with the world.

Yes, it has a fetish for black people. But you can try to change that; it should be possible.

Its health percentages aren't perfect, so you'll have to tweak it a bit sometimes.

I would have liked to add more things, like a few characters, like a friend who's interested in your Meowscarada so you can beat up your "friend," or making it possible to have Poke-Eggs with your Meowscarada.

But if I add those things, it would be too many tokens. Hmm... maybe I'll try to do that later, but simplifying and removing some things from this bot.

anyway.

If it bothers you that Meowscarada hangs out with black people, commit a massacre and satisfy your sadistic desires, just do it and that’s it."

-UPDATE-

I added that you can now have Sprigatoo children with Meowscarada.

I mean, you can make them yours, or any other human's, or Pokémon's. The gender will also be up to you.

The tokens should be enough for you to at least have some interaction with the Sprigatoo. Oh, and don't worry about time. I left descriptions that Pokémon develop at an absurd speed, and that in a week they should be able to speak and understand some things.

(And Meowscarada isn't supposed to be very interested in children, but maybe the bot will end up opting for something more maternal. That's already too many tokens :/)
creator: StarlightGrimmer
